M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. M+ Dilution-adj penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

GMX.iv_method: M2 Fee/MC Multiple, M+ Network Activity, M+ Rank Benchmark

bear_points: Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets
